title: Sandral estate
content:

{{Update|[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]}}

Scavenging Dantooine's Forgotten Houses
The Sith bombed Dantooine during the Jedi Civil War, destroying several farming estates as well as a Jedi enclave. Have your companion search these ruins for any forgotten items.
_____ explored the overgrown ruins of the Sandral estate on Dantooine and found an old cache of emergency goods and equipment buried nearby.

[[File:Sandralestate.jpg|thumb|250px|The Sandral estate.]]
The '''Sandral estate''' was the residence of the [[Sandral family]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. Not far from the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Enclave|Enclave]], the estate was visited by the amnesiac [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and his companions during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Its owner was [[Nurik Sandral]], who lived with daughter [[Rahasia Sandral|Rahasia]] and son [[Casus Sandral|Casus]].

A [[Lethisk-class armed freighter|''Lethisk''-class armed freighter]] that was owned by the Sandrals sat on the roof of the structure.

==History==
Nurik was involved in a feud with a neighboring family, the [[Matale family|Matales]] - [[Ahlan Matale]] in particular. Nurik was distraught over the loss of his son Casus, whom he believed had been killed by the rival family patriarch [[Ahlan Matale]]. In retaliation, Nurik kidnapped Ahlan's son and Rahasia's secret lover, [[Shen Matale]], holding him in the estate as a prisoner until the intervention of Revan.

Revan was able to convince the young lovers to confront their respective fathers about the long-lasting disagreement. When the two revealed their love to each other and their parents, a brief argument broke out, which Revan and his companions mediated with positive results. Shen Matale and Rahasia Sandral convinced their parental units to purchase a house for them and allow them to marry. The fathers accepted their children's pleas to allow them to wed; however, while the feud would cease between their common ground, the two parents would continue to fight.

The estate was destroyed during the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] attack on the Enclave.<ref name="TOR">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Scavenging|Dantooine's Forgotten Houses}}</ref> Around [[3643 BBY]], an individual associated with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] sent a companion of theirs to explore the overgrown ruins of the estate for items. The companion was able to find a cache of emergency goods and equipment.
